title: Determine the exact value of R(P11, P11, P11)
micro_paper_assessment: Useful saturation lemma and exact structured-family exclusion, but still too thin for the micro-paper lane without the exact theorem or a full counterexample.
family_affinity: strong exact-small-parameter three-color path Ramsey family affinity
candidate_theorem_slice: Any K20 coloring in which every vertex lies in a traceable monochromatic 10-vertex component is saturated against one-vertex extension; in particular the explicit dense 5+5+5+5 template does not extend, and no counterexample appears in the tested 5+5+5+5+1 or 6+5+5+5 block-constant deformations.
next_action: Verify the saturation lemma wording and the exact structured-family counts, then decide whether to pursue a global nontraceable-component theorem or keep this as a theorem-facing partial.
